info.english_meaning: to lick to taste to pasture

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'AsurI vE dIrGajihvI devAnAM prAtaHsavanamavAlew' (E0 brA0 84) avAlew=kiYcidalikzadityarTaH
'na hi siMhaH parAlIQamAmizaM BoktumicCati' (rA0 go0 saM0 26225) AlIQamAsvAditam
'nAlIQayA parihataM BakzayIta kadAcana' (BA0 anu0 10490) AlIQA rajasvalA udakyA puzpavatI malinI
